news.headline: Turkey's central bank governor promises to maintain a strong stance following significant economic growth.
VNET plans to offer $400 million in convertible senior notes, enhancing their data services in China.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, VNET Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: VNET), a prominent provider of carrier-neutral and cloud-neutral internet data center services in China, disclosed the initiation of a planned offering to raise US$400 million.

news.headline: Turkey's central bank governor pledges firm stance amid strong growth.
news.summary: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.8%, reaching its lowest point in three years. Additionally, the economy added 250,000 new jobs last month. This positive trend is a result of increased consumer spending and business investments. Economists are optimistic about the future growth of the economy, predicting a steady decrease in the unemployment rate in the coming months. The stock market also saw a significant increase, with the main index rising by 3.5% in response to the positive economic data. Overall, these developments indicate a strong and improving economic landscape.

news.headline: Optigo Networks updates Software Capture Tool to address vulnerabilities identified by CISA. Released on March 12, 2025.
news.summary: Optigo Networks, a prominent operational technology solutions provider, recently launched an updated version of its Software Capture Tool to address security issues identified by CISA. The release comes after vulnerabilities were discovered by CISA in the previous version of the tool. Headquartered in Vancouver, BC, the company released the new version on March 12, 2025. Optigo Networks Inc. is recognized for its expertise in OT solutions.

news.headline: Dr. Tiffany Willard appointed as Trauma Medical Director at St. Mary-Corwin Medical Center in Pueblo, CO.
news.summary: In Pueblo, Colorado, Dr. Tiffany Willard has been appointed as the Trauma Medical Director at St. Mary-Corwin Medical Center on March 12, 2025. This leading healthcare provider in the region aims to enhance their program under her leadership.

news.headline: Clark Nuber P.S. named to Accounting Today's 2025 Top 100 Accounting Firms list. Based in Bellevue, Washington.
news.summary: Bellevue-based CPA and consulting firm, Clark Nuber P.S., has announced their inclusion in Accounting Today's prestigious Top 100 Accounting Firms list for 2025. This recognition highlights Clark Nuber's standing as a top player in the industry. Headquartered in the Seattle metropolitan area, the firm is proud to be ranked among the elite accounting firms, showcasing their dedication to excellence in financial services.

news.headline: Author Karen DeKleva's holistic book integrates Psychology, Intuition, and near-death experiences to guide readers towards spiritual connection and well-being.
news.summary: Karen DeKleva, a well-known author, discusses the impactful intersection of Psychology, Intuition, and a near-death encounter in a recent interview conducted in Pittsburgh on March 12, 2025. She emphasizes how a single transformative moment can significantly alter one's viewpoint, providing a gateway to profound understandings. DeKleva's insights shed light on the potential for a deeper sense of gratitude and enlightenment through such experiences, resonating with individuals seeking personal growth.

news.headline: Fort Myers housing prices may stabilize as sales surge. Report from FortMyersAgent.com. (Characters: 81)
news.summary: Housing prices in the Fort Myers, Florida region are showing signs of stabilizing, as per the latest report from a local real estate news source, FortMyersAgent.com. The data indicates that the decline in prices may be coming to a halt. This news comes from FORT MYERS, Florida, with the report released on March 12, 2025. This information is significant for the South-west Florida real estate market and neighboring areas, reflecting a potential shift in the local housing sector.

news.headline: AMD's Ryzen 9000X3D series processors with 2nd Gen AMD 3D V-Cache now available in iBUYPOWER gaming PCs for supreme power.
news.summary: Experience unparalleled power in high-performance gaming and content creation with the cutting-edge technology of the 2nd generation AMD 3D V-Cache. This innovation includes advanced Zen 5 architecture and 4nm technology, delivering superior performance. The launch took place in City of Industry, California on March 12, 2025, making iBUYPOWER a key player in providing systems with supreme power for demanding tasks.

news.headline: "Big Picture Ranch to premiere "Kiss the Ground" and "Common Ground" on Earth Day, 2025 on Amazon Prime Video."
news.summary: On April 22, 2025, "Kiss The Ground" and "Common Ground" will have their global premiere on Prime Video to commemorate Earth Day. The announcement was made in Ojai, California, on March 12, 2025, by Big Picture Ranch, the renowned production studio responsible for the acclaimed documentaries. This event is highly anticipated and set to reach a wide audience on the streaming platform.

news.headline: Greenberg Traurig reps Kenny Chesney, Blue Chair Bay Rum in acquisition by Next Century Spirits. (Characters: 96)
news.summary: A renowned international law firm, Greenberg Traurig, LLP recently facilitated the acquisition of country music sensation Kenny Chesney and his brand Blue Chair Bay Rum by Next Century Spirits. This significant event took place on March 12, 2025 in Atlanta. The formidable legal team at Greenberg Traurig, LLP played a pivotal role in this high-profile deal, showcasing their expertise in navigating such transactions in the entertainment industry. This news highlights the growing trend of partnerships between celebrities and spirits companies.

news.headline: CGTN America features special on China's Two Sessions, highlighting innovation in AI and new economic policies.
news.summary: CGTN America's Global Business show showcases a special segment on China's Two Sessions, highlighting recent economic policies and the nation's push for technological advancements, specifically within the artificial intelligence industry. The episode delves into China's commitment to innovation, exploring trends and developments in AI and its impact on various sectors. This coverage provides insights into China's economic strategy and technological aspirations, shedding light on its efforts to strengthen its position in the global market.

news.headline: Victoria Roberts discusses Fashion Week evolution and industry trends. Fall/Winter 2025 season wrapped up globally.
news.summary: Victoria Roberts, a communications specialist, provides valuable perspectives on the evolution of Fashion Week, current industry trends, and the significance of genuine storytelling. Following the completion of the Fall/Winter 2025 Fashion Week season worldwide, Roberts offers valuable insights.

news.headline: Juice Guru Institute refutes Northwestern study claiming juicing harms microbiota. Peer-reviewed research supports juicing's health benefits.
news.summary: The Juice Guru Institute is disputing the inaccurate findings of a flawed study from Northwestern University that wrongly asserts juicing has negative effects on gut and oral microbiota. Contrary to this claim, reputable research has shown that juicing actually improves gut health, decreases inflammation, and promotes brain health. The Institute is defending juicing as beneficial and maintains that the study's conclusions are invalid.

news.headline: Woman shares belief in God's plan in autobiography "Running Into God's Arms: After Taking The Jonah Journey" priced at $14.49.
news.summary: Linda Griffith, the author, has released her autobiography titled Running Into God's Arms: After Taking The Jonah Journey, published by Xulon Press. In the book, Griffith explores her belief in God's superior plans. Priced at $14.49, this book is a personal account that parallels a story from the Bible. The autobiography is a reflection of Griffith's journey and thoughts, showcasing her perspective on faith and divine guidance.

news.headline: Author Phillip G. Richards discusses current events in the world and end-time prophecy in his book priced at $65.49 paperback and $77.49 hardcover.
news.summary: Xulon Press recently released an analysis of current events in relation to end-time prophecy. Buckhannon, West Virginia, March 13, 2025 - In his book "What I Need To Know About The End Times," author Phillip G. Richards tackles readers' uncertainties ($65.49 for paperback, ISBN: 9798868512001; $77.49 for hardcover).

news.headline: (Xulon Press) Author Hyacinth Dorleon shares advice for parents on guiding their children's lives effectively.
news.summary: Xulon Press is offering parents valuable guidance on how to positively influence their children's lives, as shared in a book titled "Parenting Realistically" by author Hyacinth Dorleon. Drawing from extensive experience as an educator, development consultant, and parent, Dorleon provides practical steps for parents to create a lasting impact on their children. This resourceful book was released on March 13, 2025, in Brooklyn, N.Y., showcasing Dorleon's wealth of experience in helping families navigate the complexities of parenting.

news.headline: Grand Prize winner Anita E. Dailey's "The Edible Word" announced in Fall 2024 Christian Author's Awards. Book available on Amazon.
news.summary: Xulon Press is thrilled to reveal the recipient of the Grand Prize in the Christian Author's Awards! The victorious author, Anita E. Dailey, has presented "The Edible Word: An Act of Faith Book." This outstanding piece is now accessible in both paperback and Ebook formats on popular platforms such as Amazon, barnesandnoble.com, and directly from Xulon Press. Don't miss the opportunity to explore this award-winning book!

news.headline: Book by Douglas E. Wilson explains how companies use personal information. Published by Mill City Press in Quincy, Mass., on March 13, 2025.
news.summary: Author Douglas E. Wilson provides a clear explanation of the inner workings of user interfaces in a new book from Mill City Press. The book, released on March 13, 2025, in Quincy, Mass., sheds light on an important topic impacting privacy and daily routines. Wilson's work aims to inform readers about the implications for their data security and habits, offering insights into this crucial issue.

news.headline: Female travel advisor wins OPAL Award for leadership and community service during Women's History Month celebration.
news.summary: In celebration of Women's History Month, Dream Vacations in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, bestowed the prestigious OPAL Award upon a remarkable female franchise owner for her exemplary leadership and commitment to community service. The award highlights the significant contributions of women in the travel industry and serves as a testament to their dedication and excellence. This annual recognition showcases the invaluable impact of female leaders, with this year's recipient standing out for her outstanding achievements. Congratulations to this deserving recipient for her exceptional commitment to leadership and service.

news.headline: transcosmos named Advanced Partner in X Ads program by X Corp, boosting brand performance. TOKYO, March 13, 2025.
news.summary: transcosmos has established a strong collaboration with X Corp. Japan K.K to enhance the performance of X Ads for brands. In a recent development on February 19, 2025, transcosmos was honored as an Advanced Partner in the X Ads Agency Certification Program by X Corp. This partnership aims to maximize advertising effectiveness with innovative strategies. Located in Tokyo, this news highlights transcosmos’ dedication to providing exceptional services in the advertising sector and signifies a significant step forward in their partnership with X Corp.

news.headline: Villas Of Distinction® wins Virtuoso® Award for Top Producing Hotels & Resorts Partner in Canada, finalist in U.S. category.
news.summary: In Canada, Villas of Distinction® was recognized as the Top Producing Hotels & Resorts Partner and also emerged as a finalist in the same category in the U.S. The prestigious accolade was bestowed upon the company in Wakefield, Massachusetts on March 13, 2025. Virtuoso®, a prominent global network focusing on luxury and experiential travel, presented the award.

news.headline: ECB's Kazaks: We can't say everything is done on inflation.
Inflation in Romania spikes unexpectedly amid lingering political risks.
Nasdaq up 1% with Nvidia, Tesla rise; Fear and Greed index in "Extreme Fear" despite slight sentiment improvement.
news.summary: The Fear and Greed index by CNN Money showed a slight improvement in market sentiment, although it remained in the “Extreme Fear” zone. U.S. stocks had a mixed day on Wednesday, with the Nasdaq Composite surging over 1% after inflation data release. In February, the Consumer Price Index decreased from 3% to 2.8% year-over-year, surpassing the anticipated 2.9% slowdown. Core inflation also saw a more significant drop than expected, falling from 3.3% to 3.1%. In April, the U.S. imposed 25% tariffs on steel and aluminum, leading to swift retaliation. In response, the EU implemented tariffs on €26 billion worth of goods. Find the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Spring cleaning company Tineco encourages a fresh start with high-performance tools for allergen-free homes.
news.summary: In Paris, as France welcomes the spring season, Tineco, a leading provider of cutting-edge cleaning solutions, encourages individuals to rejuvenate their living spaces. By offering sleek and high-functioning cleaning tools, Tineco aims to help create a spotless and allergen-free home effortlessly. Spring symbolizes a period of freshness and clarity, with increased sunlight, uplifted moods, and households in need of attention. However, it also brings challenges like pollen.

news.headline: Tineco in NEUSS, Germany aims to aid allergy sufferers by offering cleaning products to remove allergens and improve air quality.
news.summary: In NEUSS, Germany, there is a prevalent issue with allergens like house dust, pollen, and animal dander which can be a constant struggle for many individuals. These allergens tend to accumulate in corners, on furniture, and in the air, causing discomfort and health issues, especially during allergy season. Symptoms such as itchy eyes, sneezing, and breathing difficulties are common. Effective cleaning is vital to eliminate these allergens and enhance air quality. This need is addressed by a cleaning product called T, which aims to tackle these particles to mitigate health concerns.

news.headline: SuiPlay0X1 pre-orders offer exclusive NFTs and rewards, enhancing the Web3 gaming experience. Learn more now!
news.summary: Learn about the benefits of pre-ordering the SuiPlay0X1 device, which offers exclusive non-fungible tokens (NFTs) and rewards within the Sui ecosystem, enriching the Web3 gaming experience. Unlock these exclusive features by pre-ordering now.

news.headline: Swiss PPI YoY Actual -0.1% (Forecast -, Previous -0.3%)
Swiss PPI MoM Actual 0.3% (Forecast -, Previous 0.1%)

Aurora Mobile Limited announces strong financial results for Q4 and fiscal year 2024 with Q4 revenue of RMB93.2 million, 20% YoY growth, and gross profit of RMB56.7 million, 6% YoY growth. Adjusted EBITDA for Q4 was RMB1.3 million (US$0.2 million). In FY 2024, revenue was RMB316.2 million, a 9% YoY increase, and adjusted EBITDA was positive RMB3.7 million (US$0.5 million). Net Dollar Retention Rate stood at 95% for core Developer Subscription business. For Q1 2025, total revenue is expected to be between RMB74.0 million and RMB77.5 million, a 15%-20% YoY growth. The Company had repurchased a total of 278,857 ADS by Dec 31, 2024.
news.summary: Aurora Mobile Limited announced its unaudited financial results for Q4 and fiscal year ended December 31, 2024. In Q4 2024, they had revenues of RMB93.2 million, a 20% increase from the same period in 2023. They achieved positive adjusted EBITDA of RMB1.3 million. For the fiscal year 2024, revenues were RMB316.2 million, up 9% from 2023. Adjusted EBITDA was positive at RMB3.7 million. They reported net loss of RMB6.8 million for the year. They expect Q1 2025 revenue between RMB74.0 million and RMB77.5 million, a 15% to 20% YoY growth. The company had a net dollar retention rate of 95%. They also engaged in share repurchases. The business outlook is based on current market conditions subject to change. Non-GAAP financial measures show operational performance. Shareholder inquiries can be directed to ir@jiguang.cn. Website for more information: https://ir.jiguang.cn/.

news.headline: Fitch Ratings: China provinces aim for 2025 growth with higher debt and central support.
Principal AM warns tariffs may speed up US inflation, says measures could impact economy significantly.
EQT AB releases Annual & Sustainability Report 2024, marking its three-decade journey. Access report at www.eqtgroup.com/shareholders.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, EQT AB (publ) released its 2024 Annual and Sustainability Report, detailing the company's evolution since its establishment thirty years ago. The report can be accessed on www.eqtgroup.com/shareholders. The document delves into EQT's progress and initiatives, providing insights into its operations and achievements.

news.headline: ECB's Nagel to the BBC: US trade tariffs on EU could push Germany into a recession this year
Venly and Sui collaborate to enhance blockchain game development, offering new tools and APIs to boost user adoption.
news.summary: Venly has collaborated with Sui to streamline blockchain game development by offering wallet solutions, NFT and token APIs, and payment infrastructure. This partnership aims to improve user experience and increase adoption of blockchain technology in gaming.

news.headline: Thailand approves Sunwoda to invest over US$1 billion in EV battery cell plants, boosting competitiveness.
news.summary: In a recent development in Bangkok on March 13, 2025, the Commission on the National Competitiveness Enhancement for Targeted Industries in Thailand sanctioned an investment proposal. This proposal, approved during a meeting, involves a subsidiary of Sunwoda Electronic from China. The investment is valued at over $1 billion and is intended for the manufacturing of electric vehicles.

news.headline: China urges the US to cancel tariffs on steel and aluminium.
Gold's price expected to reach $3,500 in Q3, predicts Macquarie.
Japan Bankers Association chair: Market views on BoJ's terminal rate have risen more than expected
Japan Bankers Association Chair: Long-term interest rates have scope to rise further due to BoJ rate hikes and bond-buying taper
Alibaba launches AI app in competition with rivals amid tech race.
Secure Trust Bank PLC reported a 18.0% increase in adjusted profit for the 12 months ending Dec 31, 2024. CEO cites focus on targets and growth strategies.
news.summary: In London, Secure Trust Bank PLC, a top specialist lender, has disclosed its financial outcomes for the year ending December 31, 2024. CEO David McCreadie expressed satisfaction with the results, highlighting the Group's achievements in meeting medium-term goals and strategic objectives. These include enhancing balance sheet growth, maintaining net interest margin stability, and achieving cost efficiencies. Notably, the Group reported an 18.0% rise in its adjusted profit during this period.

news.headline: E3 Lithium and Pure Lithium collaborate to produce lithium metal batteries from Alberta brines, using DLE technology.
news.summary: E3 Lithium Ltd. (Ticker Symbols: TSXV: ETL, FSE: OW3, OTCQX: EEMMF) based in Calgary, Alberta, a prominent player in the Canadian lithium sector, has revealed a significant development in its collaboration with Pure Lithium Corporation. The partnership has yielded the creation of lithium metal batteries utilizing E3 Lithium's brines and DLE technology alongside the incredible battery innovation from Pure Lithium. This milestone marks a crucial step in their Joint Development Agreement. The joint effort has concentrated on incorporating E3 Lithium’s concentrate prod...

news.headline: Buyback program initiated to purchase 5 million shares to boost value for shareholders.
Preview the upcoming EU-South Africa Summit for insights.
Netmore Group extends IoT services to Brazil & South America after acquiring Everynet, tapping into critical sectors.
news.summary: Netmore Group, an IoT network operator, has extended its presence into Brazil and South American markets by acquiring Everynet. This move aims to unlock new market opportunities and cater to the rising demand for digital transformation in vital sectors like utilities, agriculture, smart cities, and transportation/logistics. The acquisition marks a strategic expansion for Netmore as it continues to strengthen its foothold globally.

news.headline: Kioxia Corporation honored as Clarivate Top 100 Global Innovators 2025 for the fourth time, celebrated for their intellectual property achievement.
news.summary: Kioxia Corporation, based in Tokyo, has been honored as one of the Clarivate Top 100 Global Innovators 2025. This prestigious award is bestowed upon companies demonstrating exceptional innovation worldwide, with Kioxia now being recognized for the fourth time. The award celebrates their significant contributions to intellectual property, as determined by Clarivate Plc's exclusive analysis. Clarivate's recognition is based on the company's distinct achievements in this field, distinguishing them among the most innovative entities globally.
